_meta.purpose: Entity-store FEED (decisions #20/#21): emits ONLY entities the store cannot discover from raw documents -- syslog-header-named devices, observers, and hostname-less devices (device/observer/fallback slots; never the self slot). IP-keyed entities use observed-<ip>@<collector>; collector suffix prefers observer.name (stable ingest pool/site id) over host.name so load-balanced Logstash backends do not duplicate the same device. The dest pipeline (m_26_14-observed-freshness, shared with the ledger) stamps write-time @timestamp so the store's lookback window can see fresh feed docs. These land as host entities keyed by host.name (real syslog hostname or observed-<ip>@<collector>); they carry NO asset.id, which is exactly how operators distinguish them from canonical inventory entities (observed-but-unexpected until resolved via entity.relationships.resolution.resolved_to to a canonical host:<host.name> entity). Add THIS index (m_26_14-store-feed), not m_26_14-observed, to the Security default data view; feeding the full ledger would duplicate every Agent host. The ledger remains the universal measurement index.

script.source: Set ids = new HashSet(); String selfName = null; if (doc.containsKey('host.name') && doc['host.name'].size() > 0) { selfName = doc['host.name'].value.toLowerCase(); } String collectorKey = null; if (doc.containsKey('observer.name') && doc['observer.name'].size() > 0) { collectorKey = doc['observer.name'].value.toLowerCase(); } else if (selfName != null) { collectorKey = selfName; } String sfx = collectorKey != null ? '@' + collectorKey : ''; boolean obsNamed = false; if (doc.containsKey('observer.hostname') && doc['observer.hostname'].size() > 0) { ids.add(doc['observer.hostname'].value.toLowerCase()); obsNamed = true; } if (!obsNamed && doc.containsKey('observer.ip') && doc['observer.ip'].size() > 0) { ids.add('observed-' + doc['observer.ip'].value.toString() + sfx); } String dev = null; if (doc.containsKey('log.syslog.hostname') && doc['log.syslog.hostname'].size() > 0) { String s = doc['log.syslog.hostname'].value.trim().toLowerCase(); if (s.endsWith('.')) { s = s.substring(0, s.length() - 1); } if (s != '' && s != '-') { dev = s; } } if (dev == null && doc.containsKey('log.source.address') && doc['log.source.address'].size() > 0) { String a = doc['log.source.address'].value.trim(); String ip = null; if (a.startsWith('[')) { int e = a.indexOf(']'); if (e > 0) { ip = a.substring(1, e); } } else { int f = a.indexOf(':'); int l = a.lastIndexOf(':'); if (f == -1) { ip = a; } else if (f == l) { ip = a.substring(0, f); } else { ip = a; } } if (ip != null && ip != '') { dev = 'observed-' + ip + sfx; } } if (dev != null) { ids.add(dev); } if (selfName == null && ids.isEmpty()) { if (doc.containsKey('host.ip') && doc['host.ip'].size() > 0) { ids.add('observed-' + doc['host.ip'].value.toString()); } else if (doc.containsKey('source.ip') && doc['source.ip'].size() > 0) { ids.add('observed-' + doc['source.ip'].value.toString()); } } for (def id : ids) { String v = id.toString().trim(); if (v != '' && v != 'observed-') { emit(v); } }
